name: Architectural Shingle Roofing System
description: Premium 30-year architectural shingle roof installation, including leak barriers, underlayment, drip edges, and valley linings. This assembly is designed to provide high-wind resistance and architectural depth to residential structures.
contractorNotes: Verify roof pitch before climbing. Use safety harness tied off to certified anchor points. Ensure drip edges overlap by 2 inches.
typicalUseCase: Standard residential replacement or new construction roof installation.
proposalScopeOfWork: Furnish all labor, material, and equipment to install architectural shingles on designated roof surface.
proposalAssumptions: Assuming roof deck is structurally sound and requires no plywood sheet replacement.
proposalExclusions: Excludes gutter replacement and chimney structural repointing.
warrantyLanguage: 10-year contractor workmanship warranty plus manufacturer lifetime limited shingle warranty.
